note: Synthetic numerical digital-twin response-surface anchor verification; not experimental data.
required_claim_qualification: Response-surface phase diagrams are acceptable as manuscript evidence only with explicit qualification: dense points are interpolated from simulator-backed source grids, and boundary regions should be described as screening evidence rather than exhaustive ODE re-solves.
source_boundary: Anchor verification compares the response surface with prior simulator-backed source grids and phase-map cases. It does not convert every dense-grid point into a new ODE solve.
